title: Heavy Duty Plastic Flexi Tub Home Garden Flexible Storage Bucket Laundry Toys Kitchen Bucket, Rubble Container, 2-Handled Recycled Tub (16L - Taupe Flexi Tub)
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND STURDY: Ideal for use in your home and garden due to its lightweight and strong durability. Whether you need it for storing weeds and garden waste, or simply to carry you’re washing outside, this Flexi tub is a great product to have at hand
EASY TO USE: This heavy-duty plastic Flexi tub comes complete with moulded handles for versatility and to allow easy lifting and transport.

MULTI-PURPOSE: This is a multi-purpose flexible tub that comes with two integrated carrying handles. It can also be carried like a carrier bag with both handles in 1 hand. Our flexible tub with handle is made of high-quality materials that make it perfect for a wide range of household tasks, from carrying laundry to storing toys.

PREMIUM QUALITY: This flexi tub is manufactured from high-density flexible plastic which is very easy to clean and is UV protected (prevents rotting in sunlight). This is made from 100% food-grade plastic. This deep flexi tub is perfect for carrying heavy groceries including bottles, putting your garden cuttings in, or even just taking on a picnic.
This flexible flexi tub with super strong comfortable handles is lightweight, flexible and tough. It is ideal for use on building sites, farms, stables and around the home and garden.
description: Manufactured from heavy-duty polyethylene with a versatile, flexible construction. Fitted with strong carry handles tested for heavy load. They are great for all sorts of jobs around the garden and home, such as toy boxes, laundry baskets, storage containers, and plaster mixing as well as for odd jobs around the garden. This is a multi-purpose flexible tub with 2 integrated carrying handles. It can also be carried like a carrier bag with both handles in 1 hand. They are great for all sorts of jobs around the garden and home, such as toy boxes, laundry baskets, storage containers, and plaster mixing as well as for odd jobs around the garden. Can be used to store practically anything Low-density polyethylene rubble container with a ribbed profile and hand grips. 100% Food grade plastic Super strong comfort handle grips They are also designed to stack inside each other (saving space whilst storing or transporting large amounts).
